channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Norris takes pole for season-ending Abu Dhabi GP and Hamilton 18th in Mercedes farewell
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — McLaren's 26-year wait for a Formula 1 constructors' title could soon be over. Lewis Hamilton's time with Mercedes is set to end on a low.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Man City drops more points after draw with Crystal Palace
item.description: Manchester City’s Premier League title defense took another blow after a 2-2 draw with Crystal Palace on Saturday. Four-time defending champion City ended a seven-game winless run on Wednesday by beating Nottingham Forest, but dropped more points with the draw at Selhurst Park.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PETA calls on SMU to end live mascot program ahead of Peruna’s appearance ACC title game
item.description: PETA has called on SMU to end its live mascot program after the Mustangs announced the Peruna would attend the Atlantic Coast Conference championship game against Clemson on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed because of Storm Darragh. Other Premier League games remain on
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool was postponed on Saturday because of Storm Darragh, which brought dangerous winds and heavy rain to the west coast. The Premier League match was due to kick off at 12.30 p.m. U.K.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Golden State Valkyries build roster by taking 11 players in expansion draft, including Kate Martin
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Once general manager Ohemaa Nyanin and her Golden State Valkyries staff had decided who to pick in the WNBA expansion draft, the first challenge became reaching each player with the news before she heard it anywhere else.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title. Boise State (12-1, No.
item.dc:creator: JASON CHATRAW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Boise State wins Mountain West championship as first expanded CFP bracket begins to take shape
item.description: Boise State won the Mountain West Conference title Friday night and earned their spot in the sport’s first 12-team playoff with a 21-7 victory over UNLV.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Texas Longhorns' live mascot, Bevo, barred from SEC championship
item.description: The University of Texas' live mascot, Bevo, will not be at the SEC title game because his 1,700-pound stature is not suitable for the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hall of Famer Randy Moss is stepping away from ESPN for an extended time to deal with health issue
item.description: Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss is stepping away from his ESPN analyst role for an extended time to focus on a personal health challenge, the network said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey gets a triple-double as the Bulls race past the Nets for a 128-102 victory
item.description: Josh Giddey had 20 points, 13 rebounds and 11 assists, helping the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 128-102 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC
